original: a T-shirt inscribed with ‘Everything’s bigger in New Texas! Take a look’ and followed by an arrow pointing down

A black T-shirt with a new Texan pickup line on the front, generally used by bulls to pick up cows with as little spoken words as possible. The white text may seem vulgar on other planets, but there is no doubting its effectiveness on New Texans. This one reads: Everything’s bigger in New Texas! Take a look (Beneath the text is an arrow pointing down.)
